name: re-fund-generic
description: Generic RE fund — Rent Roll, NOI Buildup, Cap Rate, Debt Schedule, Waterfall

mappings._comment: Generic skeleton for real estate funds. Fill with your specific cells.

notes: RE models typically use cap rate rather than EBITDA multiple for exit valuation.
outputs.exitMultiple.type should be set to 'cap_rate_inverse' — the CLI handles the 1/x conversion internally.
